meaning: 山打根[马来西亚沙巴东北部港市](或译仙那港)
examples: If Sandakan wins and extends it to the North and South Circular roads in 2021 as he intends, it is sure to spark intense opposition from the far larger number of motorists who will then be affected.
A city of Malaysia in northern Borneo on Sandakan Harbor, an inlet of the Sulu Sea.
After she went to work and got married, she lived in places like Brunei, Miri, Sandakan and Sibu.
Propulsion was restored the next day and the vessel limped into Sandakan in Malaysia.
